location: Sold by the Twin Maiden Husks at Roundtable Hold for 400 runes; also a rare (roughly 4%) drop from dagger-wielding Highwaymen and various region Foot Soldiers.
tactics: Simplest route is buying it at Roundtable Hold as soon as you first reach the hub — no fight or quest needed.
If farming instead, Highwaymen in Murkwater Cave (Limgrave) are a reliable early source for the drop.
Don't confuse it with the Bandit class's starting weapon, the visually similar but mechanically distinct Great Knife — this is the plain straight-bladed Dagger.
lore: An unassuming dagger with a straight blade — short on reach and raw damage, but light enough to jab repeatedly and land unusually strong critical hits.

builds.name: Bleed/backstab tool
builds.why: Near S-tier Dexterity scaling with Keen affinity and a very high (130) critical multiplier make it a premier riposte/backstab dagger for a pure-dex build.

builds.name: Universal affinity test bed
builds.why: Cheap, widely available, and freely infusable, so it's commonly used to sample bleed/poison/frost builds before committing to a signature weapon.
